title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!
